title: TweakHands
description: TweakHands is a lightweight Minecraft mod that gives you full control over first-person hand and item animations, positions, rotations, and scaling with real-time in-game customization.
body:
HandTweaks is a simple but powerful Minecraft mod that lets you fully customize how items look in your hands. From tiny adjustments to completely changing your first-person view, the mod gives you full control over item positioning, rotation, scaling, and more and that too all directly in-game.

Want smaller tools? Bigger weapons? Different styles for each hand? HandTweaks makes it possible with separate customization for both the main hand and off-hand, along with unique settings for different item types like weapons, tools, blocks, and food.

Everything updates in real time through an easy-to-use GUI, so you can instantly see your changes without restarting the game or messing with config files. You can even hide individual hands for a cleaner look or use presets for quick setups.

Built for Fabric, HandTweaks is lightweight, smooth, and designed to work alongside your favorite mods without affecting performance.

![e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30d839dffa7c513c8840c1f9334d761aadefcdf5_0.webp)
Features:

* Full first-person hand customization
* Separate settings for main hand & off-hand
* Adjust position, rotation, and scale
* Item-specific customization
* Real-time in-game editor
* Presets for quick setups
* Optional hand hiding
* Mod Menu support
* Lightweight & performance-friendly
* Open-source
* Minecraft 1.21.11+ Support
